name: neo-anki
description: A calm, time-aware, local-first spaced repetition desktop app.
author: Neo Anki contributors

scripts.extension:check: npm run extension:sdk && npm run check -w @neo-anki-example/study-pulse
scripts.extension:example: npm run extension:sdk && npm run build -w @neo-anki-example/study-pulse
scripts.desktop:prepare: esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:electron --outfile=dist-electron/main.mjs && esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --external:electron --outfile=dist-electron/preload.cjs && npm run license:check
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run desktop:prepare && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run build && npm run desktop:prepare && electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build && npm run desktop:prepare && electron-builder
scripts.test:desktop: npm run build && npm run extension:example && npm run desktop:prepare && playwright test --config=playwright.desktop.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.electron.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.electron-test.json && npm run check -w @neo-anki/extension-sdk
scripts.test:timezones: cross-env TZ=America/New_York vitest run src/lib/date.test.ts src/lib/planner.test.ts && cross-env TZ=Europe/Kyiv vitest run src/lib/date.test.ts src/lib/planner.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:timezones && npm run benchmark:planner && npm run license:check && npm run build && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:desktop
